title: German Cherry Crumble
description: A traditional German dessert featuring fresh cherries topped with a crunchy oat and butter crumble.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together cherries and sugar. Let it sit for 15 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine flour, oats, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
Add the unsalted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
Transfer the cherry mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Evenly top the cherries with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
